title: P'Lor
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:PLor-SW1977-59.jpg]] |name=P'Lor |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' (1977) 59]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber=[[Cybernetics/Legends|Computer interface implant]] |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Yes, yes, what is it, P'Lor?"
"A message, sir. A scrambled emergency transmission for the Rebels from someone named 'Leia.' Shall I have them return?|Orion Ferret and P'Lor|}} '''P'Lor''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] who served as an aide to [[Orion Ferret]], the owner and operator of the black market [[Space station/Legends|space station]] ''[[Bazarre]]'' during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], P'Lor aided Ferret in his attempt to swindle and [[Death/Legends|kill]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] leaders [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] over a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] deal. However, their plot was foiled in part due to the help of their [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] friend [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. ==Behind the scenes== P'Lor appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' 59]], written by [[David Michelinie]], illustrated by [[Walter Simonson]] and released in [[1982]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' (1977) 59]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 59}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Criminals]] [[Category:Cyborgs]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
